BCS Abundant Life Family Practice

Family Medicine & PA serving Bryan, College Station

Caring for your family’s needs from birth to geriatrics

Rusty Bacak MD | Catherine Miller, PA-C | Hope Odom FNP-C

979-695-3570

Services

We offer complete medical care for your entire family from pediatrics to geriatric care.

  • Acute care (colds, flu, sprains, back pain, allergies, headaches etc.)
  • Physicals
  • Immunizations
  • Gynecological care
Learn more about our practice

Patients

  • To schedule an appointment, call 979-695-3570
  • Review of symptoms form Save time, fill it out before you arrive!
  • Patient Fusion login Access your health records online!

 

Remember: we need to see your insurance at every visit!

Hours

  • Monday — Thursday 8:00am to 5:00pm
  • Friday 8:00am to 2:00pm
  • Lunch hours M to Th, 12-1. On Fridays, there is no lunch break.
